hero.description: I build SaaS platforms and AI tools that ship to production. From architecture to the first paying user. No templates, no shortcuts.

about.label: // about
about.headline: Engineering digital products with <accent>precision</accent> and purpose.
about.description: I build production-grade SaaS platforms, AI-powered applications, and modern web experiences for clients who need more than just code. They need a technical partner who understands product, design, and business.

03.desc: Pixel-perfect interfaces, advanced animations, 3D web experiences, and performance-obsessed responsive design.

project1.tagline: SaaS / Factur-X Compliance · CEO & Sole Developer
project1.description: Built solo, from architecture to production. France's mandatory e-invoicing law (EN 16931, Chorus Pro) takes effect in 2026. I built a SaaS that converts invoices to Factur-X format with 99.9% OCR precision, sub-10s processing, and full GDPR compliance. Servers in France, AES-256 encryption.

project2.tagline: AI / Invoice Extraction & AP Automation · CEO & Sole Developer
project2.description: Built solo, from architecture to production. Accounting firms were processing supplier invoices manually. I built an AI platform that auto-processes 94% of incoming invoices with 99.2% extraction accuracy, an exception-first workflow, and native integrations for QuickBooks, Xero, and REST API. 1 day to go live.

project3.tagline: Mobile App / On-Demand Services Platform · Lead Backend Dev & Website
project3.description: Designed and built the full backend architecture and marketing website. Real-time stack with Socket.IO (chat + GPS tracking), payments via Revolut Business API and Stripe Issuing, Firebase FCM push notifications, Mapbox geolocation, and Hetzner VPS deployment with Caddy reverse proxy (auto-HTTPS).

brief.title: Brief & Discovery
brief.desc: We start with a 30-min call to understand your vision, constraints, and business goals. I ask the real questions before writing the first line of code.

spec.title: Specification & Architecture
spec.desc: I write a detailed technical document: stack, database schema, API routes, component structure. You know exactly what will be built before it starts.

dev.title: Iterative Development
dev.desc: One-week sprints, preview deployments after each iteration. You see progress in real time and can adjust priorities at any point.

deploy.title: Deployment & Launch
deploy.desc: Production deployment on Vercel, Railway, or your infrastructure. CI/CD configured, monitoring in place, documentation delivered. Zero surprises on launch day.

support.title: Post-Launch Support
support.desc: 30 days of support included. Quick fixes, UX adjustments, roadmap advice. I stay available when it matters most.

pricing.label: // offerings
pricing.headline: Tailored pricing
pricing.intro: Every project is unique. I don't use fixed prices because the time needed depends on the actual scope. We start with a free call, then I send you a clear, detailed quote.
pricing.reassurance: Free quote, no commitment — just a conversation.

envelopes.title: How it works
envelopes.note: No surprises, no hidden commitment. A clear quote before we start.
items: Free 20-min discovery call to understand your project
Scope proposal with timeline and budget estimate
Development starts once the quote is approved
